justification: The diff comprehensively migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Swagger annotations to OpenAPI 3 (io.swagger.v3.oas), which are critical for Java 21/Spring Boot 3 compatibility. It also adopts Java 21/17+ idioms like text blocks (LimitAspect.java), String.formatted (CustomP6SpyLogger.java), pattern matching for instanceof (BigDecimalUtils.java, FileUtil.java, etc.), and List.getFirst() (AnonTagUtils.java, GeneratorServiceImpl.java). However, the SwaggerConfig.java change removes @EnableSwagger2 without adding @EnableOpenApi, which might break Swagger UI functionality unless handled elsewhere, slightly reducing coherence.
